title: Roxanne
meaning_summary: Roxanne remains commercially durable because its hook, vocal identity, and early Police sound still travel well across classic-rock, new-wave, and nostalgia listening.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock and nostalgia playlists support steady repeat listening.
Strong identity and recognizability help the song travel well in sync and catalog discovery.
Cross-generational replay keeps earnings resilient over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models durable streaming, classic-rock playlist use, sync usefulness, and songwriter-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing value appears materially tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred annual range based on catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
